_comment: YOUR personal fishing marks. Replace the placeholder offshore points with your REAL GPS marks (drop-offs, reefs, wrecks, spots where you've caught fish). 'type' can be: departure, dropoff, reef, wreck, structure, spot. The system ranks these by today's conditions. The more accurate these are, the better the 'where' becomes.

spots.name: Drop-off NW (placeholder)
spots.notes: Edit to your real drop-off mark

spots.name: Drop-off W (placeholder)
spots.notes: Edit to your real drop-off mark
